explanation: <Break a leg> is used to wish someone good luck, especially before a show.
<Hit the books> means to begin studying seriously.
<Under the weather> means feeling ill or not in good health.
<Piece of cake> means something is very easy.
<Hit the sack> means to go to bed.

left: cost an arm and a leg
explanation: <Cost an arm and a leg> means something is extremely expensive.

left: let the cat out of the bag
explanation: <Let the cat out of the bag> means to accidentally tell a secret.
<Once in a blue moon> means something happens very infrequently.

right: do something difficult or unpleasant bravely
explanation: <Bite the bullet> means to face a difficult situation with courage.
<Call it a day> means to decide to stop working.
<On cloud nine> means feeling very happy.
<Spill the beans> means to reveal secret information.
